column3: Creature typed correctly and destroyed.
column4: Pulls base point value from progression.csv based on current depth rank.

column3: 0 Backspaces used on the command.
column4: 25% bonus of current Base Hit. Rewards clean comms under pressure.

column3: Target cleared within the top 25% of the screen.
column4: 50% bonus of current Base Hit. Rewards fast sonar reaction.
column6: Per event, stacks with Perfect Shot

column3: 5 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).
column4: Mini-streak milestone. Keeps divers motivated before the big bonuses.

column3: 8 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).
column4: Reduced from 10. More achievable at deeper tiers where creatures are faster.

column3: 15 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).
column4: Reduced from 20. Keeps the big bonus within reach at crushing depths.

column3: 25 consecutive Perfect Shots (0 backspaces).
column4: Elite tier reward. Extremely difficult but achievable for the best divers.

column3: 1 backspace allowed per target without breaking streak.
column4: Instead of hard reset on any error, 1 backspace is forgiven. 2+ backspaces on a single target breaks streak.

column3: 1-2 Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat 10% penalty of current Base Hit. Minor slip on the comms.

column3: 3-4 Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat 20% penalty of current Base Hit. Garbled transmission.

column3: 5-6 Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat -30 points. Comms degradation from depth pressure.

column3: 7+ Backspaces used while clearing a target.
column4: Flat -50 points. Max typing penalty. Capped to prevent death spirals.

column3: Tracks consecutive hose segments severed WITHOUT a creature kill in between.
column4: A counter tracks how many segments have been severed in a row. Killing a creature resets the counter to 0. Penalty only applies on the 2nd+ consecutive segment severed.
column6: Counter resets on any creature destroyed

column3: First hose segment severed in a consecutive streak.
column4: No penalty. Diver gets a free pass on the first segment lost.

column3: Second segment severed without killing a creature in between.
column4: -100 point penalty. Pressure mounts.

column3: Third segment severed without killing a creature in between.
column4: -200 point penalty. Escalating consequence.

column3: Fourth or more segment severed without killing a creature in between.
column4: -300 point penalty per additional segment. Capped at -300 to prevent total wipeout spirals.

column3: Player destroys any creature.
column4: Resets the consecutive hose destruction counter to 0. Next segment severed will be treated as the 1st (no penalty).

column3: penalty = MAX(0, (consecutive_count - 1)) * -100
column4: Capped at -300 per event. E.g.: count=1 = 0, count=2 = -100, count=3 = -200, count=4+ = -300.

column3: Old per-segment Rank Penalty from progression.csv.
column4: REPLACED by the Consecutive Hose Destruction system above. Old behavior penalized every single segment loss.

No streak bonus. Standard base hit value.
Small streak warming up. +10% to Base Hit.
Getting in the zone. +20% to Base Hit.
Solid streak. +35% to Base Hit.
Deep streak. +50% to Base Hit.
Elite streak. +75% to Base Hit. Maximum multiplier.
Every 500 points earned within a depth rank.
column4: Flat +50 bonus every 500 points to keep momentum between rank-ups. Prevents the grind feeling.

column3: Destroy 3 creatures in a row after losing a hose segment.
column4: Small reward for recovering after a segment loss. Encourages divers to keep fighting instead of giving up.

column3: Target cleared within 1.5 seconds of appearing on screen.
column4: 15% bonus of Base Hit. Rewards lightning-fast sonar reactions regardless of screen position.
column6: Per event, stacks with Perfect Shot

column3: First creature destroyed in a dive session.
column4: Small session-start bonus. Gets the adrenaline flowing immediately.

column3: Diver reaches a new depth rank.
column4: 2x the new rank's Base Hit value as a one-time bonus. Celebrates the descent.

column3: Target destroyed in the bottom 10% of the screen (just before impact).
column4: Flat +15 bonus. Clutch save reward. Adds tension in the dark.

column2: Perfect Shot + Early Intercept + Speed Demon can all stack on one kill. Apply additively to Base Hit (e.g., 0.25 + 0.5 + 0.15 = 0.9x bonus).
Counts consecutive creature kills without a hose segment being severed. Breaking streak (segment severed) resets kill-streak counter to 0.
1 backspace per target is allowed without breaking a Perfect Shot streak. 2+ backspaces on any single target breaks the streak.
Separate counter from kill-streak. Tracks consecutive segments severed. Resets to 0 whenever ANY creature is destroyed. Penalty = MIN(-300, (count - 1) * -100).
No single event can deduct more than -300 points. Prevents death spirals at crushing depth.
Diver score cannot go below 0. If penalty would reduce score below 0, score is set to 0.
Base Hit = Apply multiplier bonuses (Perfect, Early, Speed) = Apply streak multiplier = Apply flat bonuses (milestone streaks) = Apply penalties.
